scripts.dev: concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "backend,public-app,frontend" -c "cyan,magenta,green" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:public:wait" "npm run dev:frontend:wait"
scripts.dev:public:wait: wait-on tcp:4000 && cd public-app && npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend:wait: wait-on tcp:3002 && cd frontend && npm run dev
